tools.name: subaccountManagement.createSubAccount
tools.description: Create a subaccount for a given primary account.

tools.name: subaccountManagement.modifySubaccount
tools.description: Change one or more properties of a subaccount.

tools.name: subaccountManagement.retrieveSubaccount
tools.description: Get the information of a subaccount specified with its API key.

tools.name: subaccountManagement.retrieveSubaccountsList
tools.description: Get the information of all the subaccounts owned by the primary account.

tools.name: transfers.retrieveBalanceTransfers
tools.description: Retrieve a list of balance transfers that have taken place for a primary account within a specified time period.

tools.name: transfers.retrieveCreditTransfers
tools.description: Retrieve a list of credit transfers that have taken place for a primary account within a specified time period.

tools.name: transfers.transferBalance
tools.description: Transfer balance between a primary account and one of its subaccounts. Note that balance_available_for_transfer = |account_balance - credit_limit| of the source account.

tools.name: transfers.transferCredit
tools.description: Transfer credit limit between a primary account and one of its subaccounts.

tools.name: transfers.transferNumber
tools.description: Transfer number from one account to another.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
